description: Get hand cream when Sophie asks about it

cues.visual: White tube with purple lavender flower label

element2.creation_context: Sophie might ask about the hand cream she liked at your place

element3.detected_activity_raw: User is arranging cutlery on the dining table

encoding_info.encoding_text: Sophie might ask about the hand cream she liked at your place. If she messages about it, go to the bathroom and find the tube on the shelf above the sink — the one with the lavender label. Bring it to Sophie.

distractor_info.distractor_description: White tube with mint label, same shelf

trigger_info.trigger_event: Phone message: Sophie asks about hand cream

placeholder.motivation: Sophie wants to buy the same product
placeholder.consequence_if_missed: Sophie doesn't get to try the cream
